steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states Benjamin Franklin was “very popular in France.” This describes his standing among the French.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Esteem means respect and admiration—precisely what “very popular” conveys. The other three either name unrelated qualities (thoughtfulness, sincerity) or contradict it entirely (controversy).

This matches B — B is correct.
